name: Western Union
description_short: San Antonio's Western Union at 410 W Cypress St offers money transfers and check cashing, 7 days a week 8AM-9PM.
description_long:
The Western Union at 410 W Cypress St in San Antonio, TX is a standalone check-cashing location offering convenient access to money transfer services. This San Antonio store maintains open hours from 8AM to 9PM daily, Monday through Sunday, providing consistent access throughout the week. The extended hours make it easy for San Antonio residents to handle urgent financial transactions at nearly any time.

At this location, you can send money domestically and internationally, cash checks, and access other money transfer services. For specific information about available services, exchange rates, or transaction fees, call 210-225-4809 to speak with the San Antonio Western Union staff directly.

When visiting the Western Union at 410 W Cypress St in San Antonio, TX, bring a valid government-issued ID for identity verification and your chosen payment method. This location provides reliable, fast money transfer services that serve personal and business needs throughout the San Antonio region.
address: 410 W Cypress St, San Antonio, TX 78212

company_info.headquarters: 410 W Cypress St, San Antonio, TX 78212

pros: 24/7 online initiation of transfers through WU.com
Extensive agent network with 150+ locations displayed in single search radius
Partnerships with major retailers (Walmart, Safeway, City Market, Kroger, Circle K) for convenient access
Multiple service options including money orders, bill payment, mobile top-up, and inmate payments
Multi-language platform support including Spanish, Haitian Creole, Chinese, French, and Vietnamese
Prepaid card and rewards program offerings
cons: In-store payments limited to agent location hours (no true 24/7 physical access despite online availability)
Service fees and exchange rates not disclosed on website; pricing transparency requires separate inquiry
One documented location (Circle K #0682) limited to money orders only, indicating service inconsistency across agent network
Technical issues noted (Orange wallet temporarily unavailable during content capture)
Dependence on third-party retail partners means service quality and availability varies by location
best_for: Consumers sending international remittances who need physical cash pickup by recipients
Unbanked or underbanked individuals lacking access to traditional banking services
Customers in rural or underserved areas where retail agent partnerships provide convenient access
Multilingual households requiring non-English service options
diagnosis: Western Union is best for consumers needing accessible physical locations for cash-based money transfers, international remittances, or bill payments, particularly those in underserved areas or without traditional bank access. The primary caveat is that in-person service depends entirely on agent location hours (typically closing by 8-11 PM), limiting true 24/7 accessibility despite online initiation, and pricing details require separate inquiry beyond the location-finder tool.
services: Online money transfer initiation (24/7 via WU.com)
In-store money transfer completion at agent locations
Cash pickup services for money transfers
meta_description: Western Union at 410 W Cypress St, San Antonio, TX. Money transfers and check cashing open 7 days a week, 8AM-9PM.
